data.body:
INBOUND_TYPE_MAPPING configured and verified (2026-04-24):

Set GitHub repo variable INBOUND_TYPE_MAPPING={"Bug": "bug", "Epic": "epic", "Story": "story", "Task": "task"} on navapbc/digital-service-orchestra.

Local verification with 6-hour lookback:
  fetched=2 unmapped_type=0 create_events=2

All 4 Jira issue types (Bug, Epic, Story, Task) now map to local ticket types. Issues previously writing BRIDGE_ALERT due to unmapped_type will now generate CREATE events. Full bidirectional sync unblocked.
